top_signals.title: Japan, Korean Stocks Soar as Hormuz Reopen Hopes Drive Optimism
top_signals.summary: Japanese stocks gained to record highs and Korean shares rallied after the US and Iran said they will sign a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, which would significantly relieve pressure on Asian supply chains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
top_signals.summary: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Starmer to confirm social media ban for U.K. teens ahead of G7 meet
top_signals.summary: The British prime minister is expected to confirm the ban, as well as other measures including curfews on older teenagers and tough regulations on chatbots, on Monday.
